trans-unit.source: Aspire AppHost created! To complete setup, run:
trans-unit.target: Aspire AppHost created! To complete setup, run:

trans-unit.source: Aspire AppHost created! To complete setup, run one of:
trans-unit.target: Aspire AppHost created! To complete setup, run one of:

trans-unit.source: `aspire init {0}` is deprecated and no longer affects generated AppHosts. It is accepted for compatibility and will be removed in a future version.
trans-unit.target: `aspire init {0}` is deprecated and no longer affects generated AppHosts. It is accepted for compatibility and will be removed in a future version.

trans-unit.source: Initialize Aspire in an existing codebase
trans-unit.target: Инициализируйте поддержку Aspire в существующем решении или создайте однофайловый AppHost.

trans-unit.source: Failed to create AppHost from template (exit code {0}).
trans-unit.target: Failed to create AppHost from template (exit code {0}).

trans-unit.source: Fix or remove {0} and re-run `aspire init`.
trans-unit.target: Fix or remove {0} and re-run `aspire init`.

trans-unit.source: The programming language for the AppHost (csharp, typescript)
trans-unit.target: The programming language for the AppHost (csharp, typescript)

trans-unit.source: Multiple solution files found. Please select which one to add the Aspire projects to:
trans-unit.target: Найдено несколько файлов решений. Выберите, к какому из них добавить проекты Aspire:

trans-unit.source: No solution file found. Creating single-file AppHost...
trans-unit.target: Файл решения не найден. Создание однофайлового AppHost...

trans-unit.source: Solution has already been initialized with Aspire.
trans-unit.target: Решение уже инициализировано с помощью Aspire.

trans-unit.source: The solution file '{0}' and project file '{1}' are in the same directory. The AppHost and ServiceDefaults projects cannot be created inside an existing project directory. Move the solution file to a parent directory or the project file to a subdirectory.
trans-unit.target: The solution file '{0}' and project file '{1}' are in the same directory. The AppHost and ServiceDefaults projects cannot be created inside an existing project directory. Move the solution file to a parent directory or the project file to a subdirectory.
